MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-14-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE UNCONTESTED TENTATIVE RULING ON DEFENDANTS HING LUNG COMPANY, CHUCK GONG, KATHY GONG AND YUET GONG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' GENERAL DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TIME-BARRED IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS THE FACTUAL DEFICIENCIES AS RELATED TO ANY JOINT TENANCY TERMS, DEFENDANTS' ALLEGED BREACHES, AND THE RESULTING DAMAGES SUSTAINED BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ACCOUNTING IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PLEAD THE EXISTENCE OF A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP UNDER CORPORATION CODE SECTION 15902.01 AND THE EXISTENCE OF A PARTNERSHIP IS A PREREQUISITE FOR ANY ACCOUNTING CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO CORPORATION CODE SECTION 15910.01(A). THE DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE DECLARATORY RELIEF IS UNNECESSARY UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1061 UNTIL THE PLAINTIFF ADEQUATELY PLEADS A BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. THE DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 17200 IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FAILS TO PLEAD WITH PARTICULARITY THE FACTS SUPPORTING THE VIOLATION. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE THE PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION FOR UNTIMELY FILING AND SERVICE IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. THE COURT REJECTED THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY EMAIL FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CRC 2.100-2.119.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR# 12353.
ORDER RE: DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the uncontested tentative ruling on DEFENDANTs HING LUNG COMPANY, CHUCK GONG, KATHY GONG and YUET GONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' general demurrer to the First Amended Complaint as time-barred is overruled. Defendants' demurrer to the first cause of action for breach of contract and second cause of action for specific performance is sustained with leave to amend to address the factual deficiencies as related to any joint tenancy terms, Defendants' alleged breaches, and the resulting damages sustained by the Plaintiff. The Defendants' demurrer to the third cause of action for accounting is sustained without leave to amend because the Plaintiff does not plead the existence of a limited partnership under Corporation Code section 15902.01 and the existence of a partnership is a prerequisite for any accounting cause of action pursuant to Corporation Code section 15910.01(a). The Defendants' demurrer to the fourth cause of action for declaratory relief is sustained with leave to amend because declaratory relief is unnecessary under Code of Civil Procedure section 1061 until the Plaintiff adequately pleads a breach of contract cause of action. The Defendants' demurrer to the fifth cause of action for violation of Business and Professions Code section 17200 is sustained with leave to amend because the First Amended Complaint fails to plead with particularity the facts supporting the violation. Defendants' motion to strike the Plaintiff's Opposition for Untimely Filing and Service is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. The Court rejected the proposed order submitted by email for failure to comply with CRC 2.100-2.119.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353.
